title: Hypixel Skyblock for Lunar Client
description: Tailor-made list of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience while playing Hypixel Skyblock on Lunar Client.
body:
## Hypixel Skyblock for Lunar Client **Hypixel Skyblock for Lunar Client** is a tailor-made list of popular mods to enhance your gameplay experience while playing Hypixel Skyblock on Lunar Client. These mods are validated to work with Lunar Client. _Note: To experience **Hypixel Skyblock** at its best, we highly recommend downloading [**Lunar Client**](https://lunarclient.com/download). While any modpack loader can be used, [**Lunar Client**](https://lunarclient.com/download) offers superior performance and features._ ## Modpack Content * **Aaron's Mod**: A collection of useful features for vanilla and Skyblock. * **Architectury API**: An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods. * **Cloth Config API**: A config screen API. * **Roughly Enough Items**: A clean and customizable alternative to JEI. * **Skyblocker**: A feature-packed Skyblock mod for modern versions. * **Mod Menu**: Adds a mod menu to view an in-game list of all the mods you have installed. * **More Culling**: Prevents the rendering of things you cannot see to improve performance. * **YetAnotherConfigLib**: A builder-based configuartion library. * & more! ## FAQ
What is Hypixel Skyblock and how do I play it? **Hypixel Skyblock** is a multiplayer RPG set in the SkyBlock universe, packed with content and progression. You start on a small island but quickly unlock new areas like bustling towns, dark dungeons, and massive mining zones. As you play, you level up skills, fight bosses, build your island, and collect powerful gear. You can play solo or with friends, trade with other players, and take part in events happening all the time. Ready to explore? Join using Hypixel's server IP: **hypixel.net**
How do I install the Hypixel Skyblock Modpack on Lunar Client?
Here are the five easy steps you need to take!
### Step 1: Download Lunar Client [![Lunar Client Download Grid](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/edcac7cc5f-lunar-client-download-grid.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/download) ### Step 2: Select "Versions" on the Lunar Client Launcher [![Lunar Client Launcher](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/bbe073a641-launcher-versions-tab.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 3: Click "Modpacks" on the top of the page [![Lunar Client Modpacks](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/13915e6116-lunarclient-modpacks-page.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 4: Install your modpack of choosing, in this case the **Hypixel** Modpack for Lunar Client. [![Lunar Client Modpack Installer](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/b880040165-launcher-install-play.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client) ### Step 5: Click "Launch Game" after the install is complete! [![Lunar Client Launch Button](https://cmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com/cdn-cgi/image/quality=85,format=auto/assets/42725ba855-launcher-mods-page.png)](https://www.lunarclient.com/news/mod-loading-on-lunar-client)

Be a part of our growing community, join our [Discord](https://lunarclient.com/discord) for the latest news and updates!
